seoTitle: Top Camp vs Topaz — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Top Camp and Topaz. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Top Camp vs Topaz: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Top Camp and Topaz.
heading: Top Camp vs Topaz — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Top Camp, Queensland and Topaz, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Topaz has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Top Camp (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Top Camp or Topaz safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Top Camp has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Topaz scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Top Camp scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Topaz scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Top Camp or Topaz?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Topaz has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.32% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
